languages.text: "Впервые я могу рассмотреть эту сущность отдельно от систем твоего корабля. Сколь удивительное... нет, уникальное создание ты сумел{mf||а} обуздать, человек. Ему бы точно нашлось место в моей коллекции..."

traits.locale_text: "Впервые я могу рассмотреть эту сущность отдельно от систем твоего корабля. Сколь удивительное... нет, уникальное создание ты сумел{mf||а} обуздать, человек. Ему бы точно нашлось место в моей коллекции..."

languages.text: "This is my first opportunity to view this entity separate from your ship's systems. What a remarkable... no, unique creature you have managed to bridle, human. It would certainly have a place in my collection..."
languages.original_text: "Впервые я могу рассмотреть эту сущность отдельно от систем твоего корабля. Сколь удивительное... нет, уникальное создание ты сумел{mf||а} обуздать, человек. Ему бы точно нашлось место в моей коллекции..."

traits.locale_text: "This is my first opportunity to view this entity separate from your ship's systems. What a remarkable... no, unique creature you have managed to bridle, human. It would certainly have a place in my collection..."

"This is my first opportunity to view this entity separate from your ship's systems. What a remarkable... no, unique creature you have managed to bridle, human. It would certainly have a place in my collection..."

"This is my first opportunity to view this entity separate from your ship's systems. What a remarkable... no, unique creature you have managed to bridle, human. It would certainly have a place in my collection..."

languages.text: “这是我第一次脱离你的舰船系统来观察这个实体。真是非同凡响……不，应该说是独一无二的造物，你们人类居然驯服了这样的存在。它绝对有资格进入我的收藏……”
languages.original_text: "This is my first opportunity to view this entity separate from your ship's systems. What a remarkable... no, unique creature you have managed to bridle, human. It would certainly have a place in my collection..."

traits.locale_text: “这是我第一次脱离你的舰船系统来观察这个实体。真是非同凡响……不，应该说是独一无二的造物，你们人类居然驯服了这样的存在。它绝对有资格进入我的收藏……”

languages.text: «Esta es mi primera oportunidad de ver a la entidad sin la interferencia de los sistemas de tu nave. Qué criatura tan extraordinaria... no, única has logrado someter, human{mf|o|a}. Tendría su lugar en mi colección, sin duda...».
languages.original_text: "This is my first opportunity to view this entity separate from your ship's systems. What a remarkable... no, unique creature you have managed to bridle, human. It would certainly have a place in my collection..."

traits.locale_text: «Esta es mi primera oportunidad de ver a la entidad sin la interferencia de los sistemas de tu nave. Qué criatura tan extraordinaria... no, única has logrado someter, human{mf|o|a}. Tendría su lugar en mi colección, sin duda...».

languages.text: « C'est la première fois que j'ai l'occasion de voir cette entité indépendamment des systèmes de votre vaisseau. Quelle créature remarquable, ou plutôt unique, vous avez réussi à capturer, {mf|humain|humaine}. Elle aurait certainement sa place dans ma collection... »
languages.original_text: "This is my first opportunity to view this entity separate from your ship's systems. What a remarkable... no, unique creature you have managed to bridle, human. It would certainly have a place in my collection..."

traits.locale_text: « C'est la première fois que j'ai l'occasion de voir cette entité indépendamment des systèmes de votre vaisseau. Quelle créature remarquable, ou plutôt unique, vous avez réussi à capturer, {mf}|humain|humaine}. Elle aurait certainement sa place dans ma collection... »

languages.text: "Bu varlığı, geminin sistemlerinden ayrı olarak incelemek için ilk fırsatım bu. Ne kadar dikkate değer... Hayır, benzersiz bir yaratığı dizginlemeyi başarmışsın insan. Koleksiyonumda yeri olabilir..."
languages.original_text: "This is my first opportunity to view this entity separate from your ship's systems. What a remarkable... no, unique creature you have managed to bridle, human. It would certainly have a place in my collection..."

traits.locale_text: "Bu varlığı, geminin sistemlerinden ayrı olarak incelemek için ilk fırsatım bu. Ne kadar dikkate değer... Hayır, benzersiz bir yaratığı dizginlemeyi başarmışsın insan. Koleksiyonumda yeri olabilir..."

languages.text: "Das ist meine erste Gelegenheit, das hier unabhängig von den Systemen deines Schiffes zu betrachten. Was für eine bemerkenswerte ... nein, einzigartige Kreatur hast du da gebändigt, Mensch. Sie wäre gewiss etwas für meine Sammlung ..."
languages.original_text: "This is my first opportunity to view this entity separate from your ship's systems. What a remarkable... no, unique creature you have managed to bridle, human. It would certainly have a place in my collection..."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist meine erste Gelegenheit, das hier unabhängig von den Systemen deines Schiffes zu betrachten. Was für eine bemerkenswerte ... nein, einzigartige Kreatur hast du da gebändigt, Mensch. Sie wäre gewiss etwas für meine Sammlung ..."

languages.text: 「この生物をあなたの船のシステムから切り離して見るのは初めてです。あなたの手で制御しているこの...いや、この独特の生き物。私のコレクションにきっと収まるでしょう...」
languages.original_text: "This is my first opportunity to view this entity separate from your ship's systems. What a remarkable... no, unique creature you have managed to bridle, human. It would certainly have a place in my collection..."

traits.locale_text: 「この生物をあなたの船のシステムから切り離して見るのは初めてです。あなたの手で制御しているこの...いや、この独特の生き物。私のコレクションにきっと収まるでしょう...」
